reviews.review_description: This ain’t TF2 this is peeF2. it sucks like a lot I mean it’s a remake but god it sucks!!!

The only class you get to play as is the sniper class and your only using one weapon instead of three for primary secondary and melee weapons,￼ and why do we have gorilla tag movement!?it should be human movement,￼ also add cosmetics,also￼ add the all classes and weapons,also add a server list to finally be able to fight with players.

reviews.review_title: My experience, I have not played it yet,
reviews.review_description: I have not yet played the game, but I absolutely love Tia too. It’s so nice to have a recreation of the game. I told dearest to me.

This ain't tf2, tf2 is fun this is trash once i spawned all i could was use my arms to hop if i wanted to do that i would have just installed gorrila tag, and you can't shoot, also you can only play sniper but you don't even have a sniper. I can't even select a team AND on top of that there is no tutorial so you don't even know the controls

developer_response.body: we understand the problem you are facing, the game was developed with the time it needed, and we understand the frustration and confusion...so we shutdown the legacy Online servers for dawnofthed Network supported games including this one to move on to better tools we have than we did with this game, sorry if the game wasn't what you expect. (offline play features, and games using dawnofthed network online 2 won't be effected at this time.)

reviews.review_title: Shouldn't have any recognition to TF2
reviews.review_description: Read the reviews and figured I would give this a go. Definitely need to be more original. You've copied the name and visuals from one game and the gameplay from another. Couldn't be any further from TF2. I get there's a good chance this is likely to be you're first game developed so take it as constructive criticism. Start from scratch and take your time. Survey what people want in a mmo shooter and work with it. All the best with future releases.

reviews.review_title: Please add more maps game modes and clas
reviews.review_description: If fighting is to insure in victory, then you must FIGHT Sun Sui said that, and I'd say he knows a little more about fighting than you do pal cuz he invented it and he perfected it so that no living man could best him in the Ring of Honor
They need to add mor classes make the swimming better make the bots die and make it so they can shoot and you don’t no clip through everything

reviews.review_title: Couldn't figure out how to play
reviews.review_description:
As soon as I spawned in, I was confused. I figured that a TF2 VR game would utilized the joysticks to move, but for some reason you have to swing your arms back and forth, I think?

You also spawn with a gun in your right hand, but I have 0 clue how you use it. No matter what buttons I pushed, where I clicked the gun with my left hand, the gun did nothing.

As far as I was aware, there isn't a tutorial to teach you anything about the game.

Another thing, I managed to turn on bots (had to "walk" to a button with the very uncomfortable locomotion) and I only saw two Snipers, both were walking into buildings and didn't do anything when I arrived. They seemed more like NPCs.

Conclusion: Add a tutorial, use joysticks for locomotion

Besides the fact that the game isn't good I have a few other complaints first down scale the map this is something I have experience in map making isn't  Terribly hard but you just pasted in 2fort and made it huge and two it doesn't have to have monkey movement, tf2 is good how it is.

 Also one more thing I like well made games and I can see the dev knows how to code and yes I saw the review that said "if you have something negative  to say just don't post it" these negative reviews are to help the devs. 

I believe you can make a good and well developed game. So in total what I have to say is try to make the map better size, remove monkey movement, and spend more time on the game.

 If the dev is reading this just remember the bad reviews are here to make the game better and some people are frustrated because you advertise a tf2 vr game and that is not what they are getting.
Just update some more devs then sigma game and keep monkey or me eat you and play rise beyond vr!

Somehow they took a great title like Team Fortress, and turned it into Gorilla tag trash. This game is garbage, nothing at all to do with Team Fortress. As they would have had to have rights from Steam. Which they clearly don’t. Straight garbage. This title will be removed fast, first for claiming they are developers of the original. Second it literally has a trademarked name, and has nothing to do with it at all, but claims it is the same old classic. 
Have to give one star, but doesn’t even deserve the 💩 off my shoe. Gorilla tag want to be. Garbage all the way.  
   When you see a gorilla tag thing so much, like almost 4 a day not kidding. Then yeah your title doesn’t stand out as good at all. You may have worked hard on it, but coming out with the exact style of game as everyone else keeps wasting their time on, half of these titles all get removed. So if you want a better review. Make something that stands out. Not a complete copy of others, with a trademarked picture of the original team fortress characters. That are not even in the game. So really how much work did you do?

developer_response.body:
Betting on something to be removed....real mature like your review is, my judgmental pal,

your also wrong on the opinion under what  i do not claim. i know it came from valve, they gave away thier sdk, for thier project, which i figured they wouldn't bother.

names cannot be trademarked under law unless it is a business, which valve is... so good, you got one thing correct.

but here's the thing, i didn't claim my business under valve so thats wrong.

but then you call me out just because of the locomotion......


The locomotion can be the same, as long as the IP of gorilla tag isn't used, so calling it trash isn't really fair my friend. 

if your going to crap on a game, if the developers tried, you might want to hold back a little...otherwise going after a dev is not right.


at the same time, you wasted a review for this essay, which gives no power to you, and more attention for my projects, so yeah, keep it going buddy.
